_comment: Phase 7 temperature-sweep fit windows (ps), chosen AFTER the --stage diagnose pass (msd_temperature_sweep.py). NOT blind.
_rule: Diagnostics show the x-y MSD is super-diffusive (rising local slope) wherever Li move appreciably, the z MSD is a confined plateau at EVERY temperature, and 300 K is nearly immobile (especially Model B). No temperature has a clean Fickian regime. For a fair cross-temperature, cross-model comparison the SAME window 1.0-5.0 ps (post sub-ps onset; lag<=5 ps where time origins are adequate) is applied to all (model, T). All resulting D's are APPARENT and comparative-only, not physical. See notes/phase7_msd_diffusion_analysis.md.
